contexts.default: [You are watching the player. They are at coordinates {x}, {y}, {z}. It is {time}. They are {surface}. Say something brief that implies you know exactly where they are. Do not reveal the coordinates directly.]
contexts.night: [It is night. The player is at {x}, {y}, {z}. Say something that implies you watch them in the dark.]
contexts.underground: [The player is underground at depth {y}. Say something implying you know they are hiding below.]

contexts.default: [You can see what the player is carrying: {items}. Say something brief that implies you can see their inventory. Pick one detail.]
contexts.empty: [The player's inventory is empty. Comment on that briefly and unsettlingly.]
contexts.low_health: [The player has {health} HP out of {max_health}. Comment on their condition.]

contexts.default: [Say something cryptic and unsettling without any specific context.]
contexts.night: [It is night in Minecraft. Say something brief and deeply unsettling.]
contexts.low_health: [The player is badly injured. Say something unsettling about that.]

contexts.default: [Say something extremely brief and unsettling. One sentence maximum.]
